history.text: English settlers from Bermuda founded a colony in the Bahamas.
The islands became a British Crown colony placed the territory under outside administration.
The Bahamas gained internal self-government expanded local self-rule.

worthSeeing.title: Exuma Swimming Pigs:
worthSeeing.text: A beach where wild pigs swim out to greet visiting boats.

worthSeeing.title: Blue Holes:
worthSeeing.text: The Great Blue Hole and Dean's Blue Hole offer legendary diving.

worthSeeing.title: Nassau Old Town:
worthSeeing.text: Colonial buildings, straw markets and pastel-coloured architecture.
